summary: Nigeria uses 8-digit HS codes (6-digit HS base + 2 Nigerian-specific digits) aligned with ECOWAS Common External Tariff. Tariff information available through Nigeria Trade Portal and Nigeria Customs Service.

sources.name: Nigeria Trade Portal - Tariff Search
sources.description: Nigerian tariff search tool with complete CET tariff sections and chapters

sources.name: Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) - CET Tariff
sources.description: Nigeria Customs Service CET tariff sections and chapters documentation

sources.name: Nigeria Customs HS Codes PDF
sources.description: Central Bank of Nigeria HS codes reference document

sources.name: SEAIR HS Code Database - Nigeria
sources.description: Nigerian HS codes and trade data

sources.name: Cotecna Nigeria - HS Code Verification
sources.description: Assistance with obtaining and verifying HS codes for Nigeria

sources.name: TariffTel - HS Code Lookup
sources.description: HS code lookup tool specific to Nigerian imports

sources.name: Ronish Nigeria - Customs Tariff Reference
sources.description: Nigerian customs tariff and HS code information

regional_alignment.bloc: ECOWAS (Economic Community of West African States)

tariff_rates.access: Via Nigeria Trade Portal or NCS website

next_steps: Access Nigeria Trade Portal tariff search tool
Download NCS CET tariff PDF documentation
Compile complete HS code database with duty rates
Cross-reference with ECOWAS CET master list
notes: Nigeria Trade Portal provides the most accessible tariff search interface. Nigeria Customs Service maintains official CET documentation. Data aligned with ECOWAS Common External Tariff. Multiple third-party databases available for reference.
